quoteLast: proceeded S. 17° East, speed fourteen knots, and  continued search for survivors of the _Saint Pierre_.
title: The Corsair in the war zone
author: Paine, Ralph Delahaye, 1871-1925

quoteLast: , however, other battleships were sighted, and Admiral Evan-Thomas realised that the Fleet was deploying to port, the 6th Division being the starboard wing column.
title: The Grand Fleet, 1914-1916
author: Jellicoe, John Rushworth, 1859-1935
